character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Managed the inn, repaired it, and added furniture including an armchair for the narrator's mother.

character_dossiers.name: old Tom Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: A bachelor who grumbles and laments, with no authority to act against the squire's decisions.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A former presence at the inn who caused discomfort and is no longer there.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Lives at the Admiral Benbow inn with the narrator's boy apprentice.

character_dossiers.name: the boy
character_dossiers.biography: An apprentice at the inn, described as clumsy and replaced by the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Resides at an inn overseeing the schooner, dressed as a sea-officer.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Arrived from London the previous night.

character_dossiers.name: the narrator
character_dossiers.biography: Left home for an unknown island to seek buried treasure.

character_dossiers.name: the stout old gentleman
character_dossiers.biography: A passenger on the mail carriage with the narrator and Tom Redruth.
